breakdown: This PR refactors rewards box numeric extraction to use a centralized robust converter with fallback key chains. It introduces a `_get_raw` helper that iterates through multiple possible input keys (aliases like xp_gained, xp, xp_awarded) and handles edge cases (0, NaN, empty strings). The new test file validates multiple edge case scenarios including messy LLM string outputs and fallback logic. Minor deduction for using `Any` type in the internal helper.
key_changes: Refactored numeric extraction to use `_get_raw` helper with fallback key chains
Migrated to centralized `_DNC.convert_value` for robust type conversion
Added logic to handle NaN, infinity, zero, and empty string edge cases
Created comprehensive test file covering 6 scenarios including real E2E
Added explanatory comments describing WHY non-finite values are skipped
